description_long: This object is a vintage fax machine with a prominent peach-colored telephone handset resting on top, secured by a coiled cord. The main body is a rectangular box with a slanted control panel featuring a series of large, raised buttons, some of which are labeled and grouped in rows. The base is off-white with visible wear, stains, and a 'Vintage Labels' sticker, giving it a used, urban look. The control panel includes indicator lights and labeled sections such as 'REDIAL', 'LOAD', and 'INCOMING CASSETTE', as well as a numeric keypad. The paper tray is integrated at the rear, with a slot for paper output at the front. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws, rubber feet, and a mix of plastic and metal components.
description: A worn, vintage fax machine with a peach-colored corded handset, raised buttons, and a slanted control panel, set on a stained off-white base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the peach handset, slanted keypad, and the 'Vintage Labels' sticker on the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handset, the coiled cord, and the vented panel at the back of the base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the coiled cord, keypad, and some surface stains on the base.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full control panel, keypad, labeled buttons, indicator lights, and the paper output slot.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is slanted and occupies the upper front surface, with a numeric keypad in the center, grouped rectangular buttons to the right, and indicator lights and labeled sections ('REDIAL', 'LOAD', 'INCOMING CASSETTE') above the keypad. The buttons are arranged in rows, and the panel is bordered by vented and flat surfaces.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the rear of the machine, integrated into the top surface, and appears to be open with no visible cover or adjustable guides.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front lower center of the machine, directly below the control panel, with no visible guides or trays.
attribute_handset_attachment: A peach-colored corded telephone handset is docked on top of the machine, secured in a molded cradle and connected by a coiled cord to the main body.
